en: You're big. That was awesome. Thank you. Thank you. Thank you. Thank you. Thank you.
ko: 너 정말 대단해. 멋졌어. 고마워. 고마워. 고마워. 고마워. 고마워.

en: Thank you. Thank you. Thank you.
Big fans of the Late Late Show, I think.
ko: 레이트 레이트 쇼의 큰 팬인 것 같아.

en: They were probably a bit nervous, but they probably didn't want to ask her a photo
ko: 아마 조금 긴장했겠지만, 사진을 요청하고 싶지 않았던 것 같아.

en: because they know I get it all the time.
ko: 왜냐하면 나는 항상 그런 요청을 받으니까.

en: Should we listen to some music? Let's do it. Do you want to listen to some music?
ko: 알아요. 음, 음악 좀 들을까요? 그러죠! 음악 듣고 싶어요? 그러죠!

en: Such a huge tune. OK. You ready? Ready. I'm pumped. I'm pumped.
ko: 정말 대단한 곡이야. 준비됐어? 준비됐어. 신나.

en: Just shout whenever, and I'll be there. What? You are my love. You are what? You are my heart.
ko: 언제든지 외치면 내가 갈게. 뭐라고? 너는 내 사랑이야. 너는 뭐라고? 너는 내 마음이야.

en: And we will never, ever, ever be apart.
Said there's another girl right in my eyes.
ko: 내 눈앞에 다른 여자가 있다고 했어.
